title: Churros with Argentine-Style Dulce de Leche
description: A sweet and indulgent dessert featuring crispy churros served with a rich Argentine-style dulce de leche sauce.
instructions: Heat 1 1/2 cups heavy cream in a saucepan over medium heat.
Bring to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
Whisk in 1/2 cup dulce de leche sauce until smooth.
Dip churros into cooled dulce de leche sauce, coating completely.
Place coated churros on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with additional dulce de leche sauce, if desired.
